Legends Brews & Cues

Arcade Cabinet

  1. Insert 2 credits ($0.50)
  2. Search for a game number
  3. Use joystick to select game
  4. Press START
  5. Enter initials when you earn a high score
  6. Submit your score on Leaderboards

Type a game name to find its menu number.
